raw_extraction.innovation: Proposes a hierarchical Vision Transformer (GC ViT) with global context self-attention modules that leverage global query tokens to efficiently capture both long- and short-range spatial interactions without expensive operations like shifting windows or computing attention masks
raw_extraction.application: Image classification, object detection, instance segmentation, semantic segmentation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient modeling of long-range spatial dependencies in vision transformers
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Object detection, instance segmentation, semantic segmentation
